default: Welcome to the Victoria & Albert Museum
and the October Half Term
Music Making Bonanza!
I'm a PhotoSYNTH...
Smile or open your mouth to begin!
Pose like your favourite emoji for new sounds
Tilt your head to change notes and octaves
And carry on the fun at home!

instructions: Let's make music with faces. What face do you make when someone gives you a big cuddle?
What face do you make when your friend makes you laugh and you can't keep a straight face?
What face do you make when you find your favourite snack and it is exactly what you wanted?
What face do you make when you hear a very funny noise and need to know what it was?
What face do you make when you get a sticker and feel super proud?
What face do you make when someone says surprise and your eyebrows leap up?
What face do you make when you get to jump in a puddle and splash everywhere?
What face do you make when you build a very tall tower all by yourself?
What face do you make when you smell something yummy and want a taste?
What face do you make when you drop your ice cream and watch it plop down?
What face do you make when it starts raining just when you want to play outside?
What face do you make when you lose your teddy and start looking everywhere?
What face do you make when someone says it's time to tidy up all the fun?
What face do you make when your tower falls down just before you show it off?
What face do you make when you taste something yucky and want to spit it out?
What face do you make when your socks feel wet and squelchy?
What face do you make when you can't find your shoe and need to leave soon?
What face do you make when you are waiting and waiting for your turn at last?
What face do you make when someone takes your toy without asking first?
What face do you make when you are trying not to laugh but the silly feeling grows?
What face do you make when someone shares with you and it feels kind?
What face do you make when someone won't share and you feel cross about it?
What face do you make when you hear your favourite song and want to dance straight away?
What face do you make when you are pretending to be a grumpy bear with a rumbly tummy?
What face do you make when you are surprised and don't know what will happen next?
What face do you make when you feel really sleepy and your eyelids feel heavy?
What face do you make when you are sleepy but trying to keep playing just a little longer?
What face do you make when you see a dog much bigger than you expected?
What face do you make when a monkey steals your banana and races away?
What face do you make when you see the biggest cake in the world and want a slice?
What face do you make when a feather tickles your nose and a sneeze is coming?
What face do you make when you are a king or queen on a throne and everyone is watching?
What face do you make when you are a dragon trying not to sneeze a puff of fire?
What face do you make when you are a lion with a sore paw trying to stay brave?

default: Welcome to the Victoria & Albert Museum
and the October Half Term
Music Making Bonanza!
I'm a PhotoSYNTH...
A SMILE POWERED SYNTHESIZER =D
Accessible musical instrument
(and super pop video machine!)
Part of the Accessible Musical Instrument Collection
Curated by Drake Music
Smile or open your mouth to begin!
Change instruments and video effects by posing...
like your favourite emoji =P
Each expression will change the sound
Be fond and show your affection
For beautiful VFX
and remixed visuals
Tilt, twist and bend your neck
to change between notes and octaves
Your job is to make some beautiful music!
Things are definitely more fun with friends
And far more musical and interesting too!
Scan the QR code on the right to continue playing on your own device
And carry on the fun at home!
Or you can go to interface.place
Or photosynth.app to learn more.
